deprecation_criterion: when the [rabbit] print convention is replaced by a structured logging facility
title: rabbit-print-invocation
description: Wire-format schema for the arguments passed to rabbit_print(text, icon, color, format). Use this schema to validate any artifact (runtime alert dicts, banner_result payloads, configurable alert-message dicts) that supplies arguments for the [rabbit] direct-call renderer. There is no message-id registry — every producer supplies text/icon/color inline.
